# Telecom Network Operations

## Network Latency
Network latency describes the delay experienced when data moves across a communications network. Low latency is essential for video calls, online gaming, and real-time transaction systems. Operators seek to reduce latency through network design, traffic engineering, and routing optimization.

## Routing Optimization
Routing optimization selects paths that balance efficiency, cost, and reliability. Modern network operations use traffic analysis and dynamic controls to steer flows around congestion. Good routing reduces packet loss and improves user experience.

## Service Outage Response
Service outage response focuses on detecting, communicating, and resolving incidents quickly. Effective response plans include monitoring, escalation paths, and customer communications. Fast recovery protects revenue and preserves trust.
